# Acme Example API v3alpha1

Feature flags, experiments, and pipeline preview for the Acme fixture.

## Operations

- [Assign an experiment cohort](operations/assignExperiment.md)
- [Get pipeline run status](operations/getPipelineRun.md)
- [List feature flags](operations/listFeatureFlags.md)
- [Start a pipeline run](operations/startPipeline.md)
- [Stream assignment updates](operations/streamAssignments.md)
- [Upsert a flag override](operations/upsertFlagOverride.md)
- [Watch pipeline events](operations/watchPipeline.md)

## Schemas

- [Schema ExperimentAssignment](schemas/ExperimentAssignment.md)
- [Schema FeatureFlag](schemas/FeatureFlag.md)
- [Schema FlagOverride](schemas/FlagOverride.md)
- [Schema PipelineEvent](schemas/PipelineEvent.md)
- [Schema PipelineRun](schemas/PipelineRun.md)
- [Schema PipelineSpec](schemas/PipelineSpec.md)
- [Schema Problem](schemas/Problem.md)
